nasb.text: Now Jesus had not yet come into the village, but was still in the place where Martha met Him.

esv.text: Now Jesus had not yet come into the village, but was still in the place where Martha had met him.

cnv.text: 那時，耶穌還沒有進入村子，仍然在馬大迎接他的地方。

ccb.text: 那时，耶稣还没有进村子，仍在玛大迎接祂的地方。

csbs.text: 当时，耶稣还没有进村子，仍在玛妲迎接他的地方。
